# [PKT-SRV-001](task-0146): Provider Service Seam

## Purpose

Implement optional provider service seam.

## Scope

- Service interface
- Implementation
- Configuration

## Implementation

1. Define interface
2. Implement service
3. Add config

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Interface defined
2. Service works
3. Configurable
